bird.summary: The black-bodied woodpecker (Dryocopus schulzii) is a Near Threatened species of bird in subfamily Picinae of the woodpecker family Picidae…

locations.name: 大查科
locations.summary: 大查科（西班牙語：Gran Chaco，直译：「大獵場」），又译作大厦谷，是南美洲中部的冲积平原。这个地名是由西班牙语“Gran”（大的）和瓜拉尼语“Chaco”（狩猎场）组成。 概述 大查科位于安第斯山脉以东，巴拉圭河－巴拉那河以西，亚…

relations.subject: Black-bodied woodpecker
relations.evidence: It inhabits the woodland and savanna of the dry Gran Chaco and the transition zones between them and moister montane forest

relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: Black-bodied woodpecker
relations.evidence: It inhabits the woodland and savanna of the dry Gran Chaco and the transition zones between them and moister montane forest
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Black-bodied woodpecker
relations.evidence: "The species is threatened by habitat loss through clearance of woodland for the expansion of agriculture and cattle-ranching, plantations of non-native trees, as well as selective logging of quebracho and algarrobo trees for charcoal." It apparently has two population centers, in Argentina's Córdoba and San Luis provinces and in central Paraguay, and is very scarce elsewhere
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
